full_text:
Shi Dan 施但
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Shi Dan (施但)was born in Wuxing. Led 10,000 men in revolt against Sun Hao. Crushed by Zhuge Jing and Ding Gu.
